title: Select a map shape instead of a struct
prompt: Write `MyApp.Accounts.user_summaries/0` that returns a list of plain maps `%{id: ..., name: ..., email: ...}` — not partial User structs. Use `select: %{...}` so Ecto knows to return maps. Write to `lib/my_app/accounts.ex`.
tier_rationale: Single select clause; distinct from struct shape but well-documented.
